name: textarea
title: Textarea
description: CIDS Textarea v0.9.0 (draft) вҖ” docs ship with the code (Textarea.doc.md).

files.content:
# Textarea

Status: draft
Version: 0.9.0
Multi-line text entry вҖ” Input's sibling, same border/focus/invalid grammar.

## Usage

```tsx
import { Textarea } from "@/design-system";

<Textarea placeholder="Describe the issueвҖҰ" />
<Textarea rows={5} invalid aria-label="Note" />
```

Best for: free-form text longer than a line вҖ” notes, memos, feedback,
transaction messages. For single-line values use Input; for amounts use
AmountInput. Label it from the caller (visible `<label>` preferred,
`aria-label` otherwise).

## Anatomy

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ вҶҗ border-outline-variant,
в”Ӯ placeholder / typed text    в”Ӯ   rounded-control, px-3 py-2
в”Ӯ                             в”Ӯ вҶҗ rows controls initial height
в”Ӯ                            вҶ•в”Ӯ вҶҗ resize-y only (never horizontal)
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `invalid` | `boolean` | `false` | Sets `aria-invalid` + sell border. Pair with visible error text. |
| `rows` | `number` | `3` | Initial height in text lines. |
| `className` | `string` | вҖ” | cn-merged. |
| вҖҰrest | `TextareaHTMLAttributes` | вҖ” | `value`, `onChange`, `placeholder`, `disabled`, etc. |

## Tokens

`--surface-container` В· `--outline-variant` В· `--outline` (focus) В·
`--sell` (invalid) В· `--radius-control`

## States

- **Rest**: outline-variant border.
- **Focus**: border raises to outline (no ring вҖ” matches Input).
- **Invalid**: sell border + `aria-invalid` вҖ” always with adjacent
  error text; the border alone is not the message.
- **Disabled**: 40% opacity, no pointer.

## Motion

150ms on border-color/background-color only. User resize (`resize-y`)
is native and unanimated.

## A11y

Real `<textarea>` вҖ” native semantics, form participation, IME support.
`invalid` sets `aria-invalid` for screen readers; the visible error text
next to the field is the actual message. Don't cap length silently вҖ”
show a counter if a max matters.
